title: Software Engineer 2 - AI/ML
description:
About Boomi and What Makes Us Special

Are you ready to work at a fast-growing company where you
can make a difference? Boomi aims to make the world a better
place by connecting everyone to everything, anywhere. Our
award-winning, intelligent integration and automation
platform helps organizations power the future of business.
At Boomi, you’ll work with world-class people and industry-
leading technology. We hire trailblazers with an
entrepreneurial spirit who can solve challenging problems,
make a real impact, and want to be part of building
something big. If this sounds like a good fit for you, check
out boomi.com  or visit our Boomi Careers page to learn
more.

How You'll Make An Impact As a Software Engineer 2, you will
contribute to the development of backend systems and
services, working closely with senior engineers to build
scalable and efficient solutions. This role offers an
excellent opportunity to gain exposure to cutting-edge
technologies in Agentic AI applications.


What You Will Do

- Develop and maintain backend services using Python or Java.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
  following established coding standards and best practices.
- Contribute to the development and testing of features,
  ensuring code quality through comprehensive testing.
- Participate in code reviews, learning from feedback and
  contributing constructive suggestions to peers.
- Assist in troubleshooting and resolving issues in
  development and production environments.
- Engage in continuous learning to stay current with emerging
  technologies and development practices.

The Experience You Bring

- Programming Skills: Strong foundational programming skills
  in Python or Java. Comfortable writing clear, efficient
  code and understanding core programming concepts including
  data structures and algorithms.
- Database Fundamentals: Solid understanding of database
  concepts with hands-on experience in SQL and exposure to
  NoSQL databases. Knowledge of database design principles,
  normalization, and writing efficient queries.
- Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google
  Cloud.
- Familiarity with RESTful API design and development.
- Agentic AI: Demonstrated interest and some hands-on
  experience with Agentic AI applications. Understanding of
  basic AI agent concepts and exposure to building or
  experimenting with agentic systems using frameworks such
  as AWS Bedrock, LangChain, LangGraph, or similar tools.
- Software Quality: Commitment to writing high-quality code
  with experience in unit testing. Familiarity with testing
  frameworks and understanding the importance of code
  quality and maintainability.
- Version Control: Experience in Git and understanding of
  collaborative development workflows.
- Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving
  abilities with attention to detail and willingness to
  learn from challenges.
- Communication & Collaboration: Excellent communication
  skills with the ability to articulate technical concepts
  clearly. Strong collaboration mindset and eagerness to
  work effectively in team environments.
- Learning Mindset: Curiosity and enthusiasm for learning new
  technologies, tools, and best practices in software
  engineering.

Education & Experience

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field
  with 2+ years of experience in software development.
- Participation in hackathons, open-source projects, or
  personal projects demonstrating software development
  skills.

#LI-ML1

Be Bold. Be You. Be Boomi. We take pride in our culture and
core values and are committed to being a place where
everyone can be their true, authentic self. Our team members
are our most valuable resources, and we look for and
encourage diversity in backgrounds, thoughts, life
experiences, knowledge, and capabilities.

All employment decisions are based on business needs, job
requirements, and individual qualifications.

Boomi strives to create an inclusive and accessible
environment for candidates and employees. If you need
accommodation during the application or interview process,
please submit a request to talent@boomi.com. This inbox is
strictly for accommodations, please do not send resumes or
general inquiries.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend services using Python or Java
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following established coding standards
Contribute to the development and testing of features, ensuring code quality through comprehensive testing
Participate in code reviews, learning from feedback and contributing constructive suggestions to peers
Assist in troubleshooting and resolving issues in development and production environments
Engage in continuous learning to stay current with emerging technologies and development practices
use_cases: Backend systems and services for integration platform
Agentic AI applications for business automation
Scalable and efficient solutions for connecting systems
RESTful API design and development for platform services
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role is primarily a backend software engineering
position working with Python or Java, databases, and cloud
platforms. While it mentions exposure to Agentic AI and
requires familiarity with tools like LangChain and
LangGraph, the core responsibilities focus on general
software development tasks (backend services, code reviews,
testing) rather than building, deploying, or fine-tuning AI
models or agents.
